body:
The easiest way is to request **2–4 free estimates** from reputable garage door installers so you can compare pricing, door options, warranties, and installation timelines.

Here are a few well-reviewed companies that serve the East Bay:

  * Boulevard Garage Doors, LLC

  * R&S Overhead Garage Door, Inc.

  * Certified Garage Doors LLC

  * Garage Door Pros & Automatic Gates

Many companies also let you request a quote online, including [Precision Garage Door of East Bay](https://precisiondooreastbay.com/?utm_source=chatgpt.com) and [Door Pros](https://www.doorpros.com/garage-door-services/?utm_source=chatgpt.com). Both advertise free estimates for new garage door installations. [Precision Garage Door East Bay | Repair, Openers & New Garage Doors](https://precisiondooreastbay.com/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)[Residential & Commercial Garage Door Services - Door Pros](https://www.doorpros.com/garage-door-services/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

When requesting a quote, it's helpful to include:

  * Your city (for example, Oakland, Berkeley, Walnut Creek, etc.)

  * Whether you need a **single** or **double** garage door

  * Approximate opening size (if known)

  * Whether you're replacing an existing door or installing a new one

  * Preferred material (steel, wood, aluminum, glass, insulated, etc.)

  * Whether you also want a new opener

When comparing quotes, make sure each one specifies:

  * Door manufacturer and model

  * Insulation (R-value), if applicable

  * Removal and disposal of the old door

  * New tracks, springs, and hardware

  * Opener (if included)

  * Warranty on both parts and labor

For a standard replacement in the Bay Area, homeowners commonly see installed prices starting around **$1,500–$2,500** for a basic single steel door, with insulated, custom, or double-door installations costing more depending on the style and options. [Garage Door Installation Bay Area | New & Replacement](https://integritygd.com/services/garage-door-installation?utm_source=chatgpt.com)[Find Garage Door Installation Services in East Bay | HomeStars](https://www.homestars.com/windows-doors/garage-door-installation-pros/east-bay?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

If you'd like, tell me:

  * your city in the East Bay,

  * single or double garage,

  * and whether you want a budget, mid-range, or premium door,

and I can suggest what a competitive quote should look like for your project.
